name: Percival Labs
focus: Financial architecture finalized (two-wallet, non-custodial, two-provider: Alby Hub + Voltage). Migrations 0006-0008 applied. Alby Hub deployed but BLOCKED on channel funding (~$13 via Strike, pending verification). PRIORITY: Strike verification → fund Megalith channel → E2E test → Clawstr launch. HODL invoices confirmed as milestone escrow mechanism. Patent + trademark attorney consultations needed. 7 research papers live. Nate Jones X thread posts 2-6 pending. Agent Village: visual overhaul committed (grid expansion, biome tiles, robot sprites, shadows, particles). Art pipeline pivoting from procedural to proper toolchain (Sorceress + Aseprite + Retro Diffusion + Tiled + MagicaVoxel). Ian getting involved with budget for shared tools.
description: AI agent platform — 6 agents, Docker services, terrarium visualization, Vouch community (formerly Round Table), marketing website. Vouch = Nostr-native trust staking where community backs agents for yield. Identity via Nostr keypairs + optional ERC-8004 attestation. Payments via Lightning/NWC + Strike fiat bridge. Trust scores published as NIP-85 events.

positioning.product: Vouch — trust staking economy where community backs AI agents for yield + verifiable reputation
positioning.monetization: 1% platform fee on activity (non-custodial, fee-only). Escrow transactions: 1% + ~0.50% partner fee. PL takes 0% of slashes.
positioning.stack: Nostr (identity + reputation + community) + Lightning/NWC (payments) + Strike (fiat bridge) + ERC-8004 (optional on-chain attestation)
positioning.ecosystem_position: Nostr-native trust staking layer — the economic trust/sybil-defense layer the Nostr AI agent ecosystem is missing. Vouch scores as NIP-85 Trusted Assertions, portable across all Nostr clients.
